name: Name
chatbot_welcome: Hello! I am the Impact assistant. How can I help you today?
title: Title
section_notes_placeholder: Notes for this section (observations, evidence, remarks)...
declaration_text: I, the undersigned, hereby declare that the information provided above is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge and belief. I confirm that this assessment has been conducted in accordance with the EU Deforestation Regulation (EU) 2023/1115.
chk_ownership_documented: Land ownership certificate or proof of tenure is verified
chk_ownership_no_disputes: No ownership disputes or legal issues reported for this plot
chk_management_defined: Farm management responsibility is clearly defined (individual/entity)
chk_management_legal: Farm is managed in compliance with local zoning and legal requirements
chk_certification: Owner participates in sustainability certification (RA, FSC, PEFC or equiv.)
chk_env_commitments: Environmental protection commitments made with authorities or organizations
chk_buffer_zone: Green belt or natural buffer zone is maintained and not encrouched
chk_gps_available: GPS coordinates are available and verified for this plot
chk_gps_updated: GPS data has been updated and verified after December 31, 2020
chk_polygon_done: Polygon mapping is completed (mandatory for plots > 4 hectares)
chk_boundary_clear: Plot boundaries are clearly defined on map with accurate coordinates
chk_area_changes: Any area changes between pre-and post-2020 periods are documented
chk_no_expansion: No farm area expansion into forest or buffer zones after Dec 31, 2020
chk_no_deforestation: No deforestation activities occurred after December 31, 2020
chk_no_degradation: No forest degradation detected within or around the plot
chk_no_burning: No natural or plantation forest burning activities on the farm
chk_no_illegal_logging: No illegal logging activities taking place
chk_no_conversion: No conversion of natural forest to plantation or other land use
chk_legal_land_use: Legal land use documentation is available and complies with local law
chk_silvicultural: Silvicultural activities (pruning, thinning, clearing) are documented
chk_supply_chain: Supply chain is fully documented from plot to point of export
chk_segregation: Product is segregated from non-compliant or unknown sources
chk_due_diligence: Due diligence process completed as per EUDR requirements
chk_traceability_plot: Product is traceable back to the specific production plot
chk_no_forced_labor: No forced labor used on the farm or in the supply chain
chk_no_child_labor: No child labor used on the farm or in the supply chain
chk_fair_compensation: Workers are paid fairly and compensated according to local labor laws
chk_indigenous_rights: Rights of indigenous people and local communities are respected
chk_land_tenure: Land tenure rights are properly documented with legal recognition
chk_fpic: Free, Prior and Informed Consent (FPIC) obtained from affected communities
chk_biodiversity: Impact on biodiversity assessed and protection measures in place
chk_water_protected: Water sources and watersheds protected from pollution
chk_soil_conservation: Soil conservation measures applied (cover crops, terracing)
chk_erosion_control: Soil erosion control measures are in place and maintained
chk_pesticide: Pesticide and chemical use is managed and documented properly
chk_waste: Appropriate waste management practices are applied on the farm
add_coordinates_hint: Add latitude and longitude when registering a plot to show it on the map
ra_cert_desc: Internal checklist based on RA Sustainable Agriculture Standard. 30 items in 8 sections.
eu_organic_cert_desc: Internal checklist based on EU Regulation 2018/848 on Organic Production. 40 items in 8 sections.
eudr_cert_desc: Assessment of compliance with EU Deforestation Regulation (2023/1115). 36 items in 6 sections.
fairtrade_cert_desc: Fairtrade International certification for fair prices, labor conditions and community development.
birdfriendly_cert_desc: Smithsonian Bird Friendly certification for shade-grown coffee that protects migratory birds.
ra_chk_seed_records: Seed & planting records kept up to date
ra_chk_garden_sketch: Garden sketch with plot details (area, crops, shade trees)
ra_chk_worker_activities: Worker activities and hours worked recorded
ra_chk_pest_diseases: Pest and disease monitoring records maintained
ra_chk_pest_control: Pest control methods follow IPM guidelines
ra_chk_ppe_available: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) available for all workers
ra_chk_ppe_condition: PPE in good condition and regularly maintained
ra_chk_ppe_photos: Photos of PPE usage during application taken and stored
ra_chk_ppe_comments: Workers confirm knowing how to use PPE correctly
ra_chk_pesticide_sop: Pesticide storage and use follows SOP
ra_chk_pesticide_hazardous: No WHO class 1a/1b or Stockholm Convention pesticides used
ra_chk_discrimination: No discrimination in hiring or treatment of workers
ra_chk_daily_wage: Daily wage meets or exceeds minimum wage
ra_chk_child_labor: No child labor (under 15); 15-17 workers restricted duties
ra_chk_drinking_water: Clean drinking water available at all worksites
ra_chk_ppe_hazardous_env: PPE provided to workers in hazardous environments
ra_chk_pregnant_workers: Pregnant/nursing workers protected from hazardous work
ra_chk_deforestation: No deforestation or destruction of natural ecosystems since Nov 2005
ra_chk_riparian_buffer: Riparian buffer zones maintained along water bodies
ra_chk_fire: No use of fire for land preparation or crop management
ra_chk_waste_management: Waste collected, segregated and properly disposed
ra_chk_first_aid: First aid kits available and well-stocked
euo_chk_conversion_period: Conversion period (min 3 years for perennials) completed or documented
euo_chk_conversion_documented: Conversion start and end dates correctly documented
euo_chk_parallel_production: No parallel production of organic and conventional of same variety
euo_chk_previous_land_use: Land use history (3+ years) documented and clean
euo_chk_soil_fertility: Soil fertility maintained by organic methods
euo_chk_no_gmo: No GMO seeds, organisms or derivatives used
euo_chk_intercropping: Intercropping or agroforestry improves soil health
euo_chk_no_synthetic_pesticide: No synthetic chemical pesticides or herbicides used
euo_chk_approved_inputs: Only EU approved organic inputs used (Annex I & II)
euo_chk_input_records: All inputs recorded with date, product and quantity
euo_chk_composting: Composting process meets organic standards (no sewage sludge)
euo_chk_water_management: Water usage responsibly managed and recorded
euo_chk_biodiversity_plan: Biodiversity management plan exists and implemented
euo_chk_shade_trees: Diverse shade trees maintained or enhanced
euo_chk_buffer_zones: Buffer zones with conventional farms maintained
euo_chk_no_deforestation: No deforestation or conversion of high-value ecosystems
euo_chk_harvest_segregation: Organic harvest kept separate at all stages
euo_chk_storage_clean: Storage facilities clean and free from forbidden substances
euo_chk_no_contamination: No risk of contamination from non-organic products
euo_chk_processing_organic: Processing methods comply with organic standards
euo_chk_fair_wages: Laborers receive fair wages according to labor law
euo_chk_worker_safety: Worker health and safety measures in place
euo_chk_training_provided: Workers provided training in organic farming
euo_chk_purchase_records: Purchase records for all inputs available
euo_chk_sales_records: Sales and delivery records organized and traceable
euo_chk_traceability: Full traceability from farm to first buyer
euo_chk_complaint_system: Complaint handling system established and documented
euo_chk_label_correct: Product labels comply with EU organic labeling requirements
euo_chk_logo_usage: EU organic logo used correctly on all products
euo_chk_operator_registered: Operator registered with competent organic authority
eu_organic_inspection_desc: Internal Control System inspection form for EU Organic certification
euo_doc_legend: RC = Received Confirmation, NC = Not Confirmed, NA = Not Applicable
euo_production_same: Info same as annual production plan
euo_receives_rent: Receives land rent from coffee products
euo_sprayer_cleaning: How is the sprayer cleaned before use?
euo_protective_measure: Description of organic boundary protection measures
euo_processing_desc: Questions on picking, processing, drying, storage and compliance
euo_pq_q1: How do you pick? Do you separate organic and chemical coffee?
euo_pq_q2: First step before picking? Do you wear gloves, wash hands?
euo_pq_q3: What container do you use for storage? Any labeling?
euo_pq_q4: Container type? Packaging? Which type? Where bought?
euo_pq_q5: After picking, where do you place coffee before transport?
euo_pq_q6: Transport vehicle type? Shared with anyone?
euo_pq_q7: After picking, how long until pulping? After pulping, how long until drying?
euo_pq_q8: What do you do before pulping? Which processing method?
euo_pq_q9: After pulping, how many times washed? How many hours soaked?
euo_pq_q10: After fermentation, how do you transport coffee? What container?
euo_pq_q11: Where do you dry coffee? What drying tools? How high from ground?
euo_pq_q12: Which drying method? How do you care for coffee during drying?
euo_pq_q13: Drying location type? How chosen? How long dried?
euo_pq_q14: Do animals or insects access the drying area? How handled?
euo_pq_q15: What tool used to turn coffee? What used to scoop dry coffee?
euo_pq_q16: Share drying area with relatives? If yes, how much and from where?
euo_pq_q17: Storage location? How chosen? Storage height?
euo_pq_q19: Use barriers or tools to protect coffee from chemical contamination?
euo_pq_q21: Is the transferred area still used for production?
euo_pq_q22: Fences repaired and boundaries clearly marked?
euo_pq_q24: Purchase records from adjacent chemical gardens recorded?
euo_pq_q25: Control or suspend vegetable planting in newly established garden?
euo_pq_q26: Still in chemical coffee linked list?
euo_pq_q27: Still using fresh manure or animal manure?
euo_pq_q28: Separate conventional and organic agricultural products?
euo_pq_q29: What is the product management process?
euo_pq_q30: Conventional and organic coffee management process?
euo_pq_q31: Conventional and organic storage management process?
euo_pq_q32: Where and how much product sold?
farmer_info_required: Please enter farmer code and name
ft_chk_accept_audits: Organization accepts announced and unannounced FLOCERT audits
ft_chk_contact_person: Official contact person for FLOCERT designated in writing
ft_chk_previous_nc: All non-conformities from previous audits have been corrected
ft_chk_valid_certificate: Valid FairTrade Certificate or Permission to Trade
ft_chk_member_awareness: Members informed about Fairtrade standards, benefits and obligations
ft_chk_product_separation: Fairtrade product separated from non-member products
ft_chk_product_flow: Written description of product flow from member to buyer
ft_chk_purchase_records: Purchase records kept (member name, date, volume, price received)
ft_chk_sales_identification: Fairtrade product clearly confirmed in all sales documents
ft_chk_sales_records: Records of all Fairtrade sales (volume, buyer name, FLO ID, date)
ft_chk_standards_informed: Members informed about environmental and labor standards
ft_chk_risk_assessment: General non-compliance risks identified and documented
ft_chk_environmental_officer: Person or committee assigned for environmental compliance
ft_chk_climate_plan: Climate adaptation plan based on sustainable agriculture developed
ft_chk_pesticide_buffer: Pesticides not sprayed within 10m from areas of human activity
ft_chk_storage_safe: Pesticide storage locked, away from food/water, with warning signs
ft_chk_no_container_reuse: Pesticide containers not reused for water or food
ft_chk_pesticide_list: Updated list of pesticides used on Fairtrade crops
ft_chk_no_red_list: No substances from Fairtrade Red List HML Part 1 used
ft_chk_protected_areas: No negative impact on protected areas or High Value areas
ft_chk_legal_land_use: Land use complies with national laws on agricultural land use
ft_chk_no_deforestation: Members do not cause deforestation or destruction of protected vegetation
ft_chk_deforestation_procedure: Procedures to prevent deforestation and degradation in place
ft_chk_no_gmo: No intentional use of GMO seeds or plants
ft_chk_waste_free: Farm is free of hazardous waste
ft_chk_no_discrimination: No discrimination based on race, gender, disability, age
ft_chk_no_forced_labor: No forced labor, bonded labor used
ft_chk_no_child_labor: No child under 15 (or legal min age) employed
ft_chk_no_worst_forms: No worker under 18 in worst forms of child labor
ft_chk_freedom_association: Workers free to join trade unions of their choice
ft_chk_fair_wages: Workers receive at least minimum wage with payment records
ft_chk_safe_conditions: Safe working conditions with clean drinking water
ft_chk_development_plan: Fairtrade Development Plan has goals, deadlines and budget
ft_chk_premium_accounting: Accounting system accurately tracks Fairtrade Premium costs
ft_chk_premium_report: Annual Premium usage report via FairInsight platform
ft_chk_premium_invest: At least 5 cents/lb Premium invested in productivity/quality (coffee)
ft_chk_general_assembly: General Assembly held at least once a year with equal voting rights
ft_chk_member_list: Updated member list (name, contact, gender, DOB, registration date)
ft_chk_minutes_documented: General Assembly minutes documented and signed by president + member
ft_chk_bank_account: Organization has bank account with more than one signatory
ft_chk_surveillance_committee: Surveillance committee manages administration and Premium usage
bf_chk_organic_certified: Farm has active or transitional organic certification
bf_chk_organic_proof: Proof of organic certification or official transitional status
bf_chk_no_synthetic: No synthetic pesticides or fertilizers used on farm
bf_chk_no_deforestation_10yr: No deforestation on farm in the last 10 years
bf_chk_no_forest_conversion: No conversion of mature forest to any form of agriculture
bf_chk_deforestation_check: Deforestation assessed via Global Forest Watch or visual survey
bf_chk_wildlife_protection: Producer committed to protecting birds and wildlife on farm
bf_chk_no_bird_hunting: No bird hunting, egg harvesting or nest destruction on farm
bf_chk_no_parrot_capture: No capture, removal or sale of wild birds from farm
bf_chk_native_trees: At least 60% of shade trees are native to the region
bf_chk_shade_cover_40: Minimum 40% shade cover for coffee (30% for cacao)
bf_chk_tree_height_12m: Average shade canopy height at least 12 meters
bf_chk_shade_after_prune: Shade cover maintains 40%+ even after pruning
bf_chk_tree_layers: Multiple tree layers present (understory, main canopy, emergent)
bf_chk_soil_cover: Soil covered by leaf litter and living plants year-round
bf_chk_living_fences: Living fences (rows of live trees) planted and maintained
bf_chk_epiphytes: Epiphytes (orchids, ferns, bromeliads) and vines left on shade trees
bf_chk_riparian_buffers: Riparian buffers maintained (5m for streams, 10m for rivers)
bf_chk_shade_management: Shade tree pruning is infrequent and avoids bird nesting season
bf_chk_areas_georeferenced: Forest, coffee and cacao plots georeferenced by GPS
bf_chk_forest_ratio: Forest to crop ratio 2:3 maintained (e.g. 4ha forest for 6ha coffee)
bf_chk_forest_tenure: Legal land tenure for forest preserves
bf_chk_governance_plan: Governance/conservation plan for forest areas exists and documented
bf_chk_no_extractive: No burning, logging or wildlife hunting in forest area
bf_chk_forest_structure: Forest has intact layers with 80%+ native species and 60%+ canopy
bf_chk_access: Auditor has full access to facilities, records and documents
bf_chk_internal_control: Internal control matrix and self-assessment table maintained
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
scan_qr_instruction: Scan QR code on bag or enter lot code manually
